name: RiverStop
description: Dam 3->Hardy floats; trips flexible by daily flow (Dam 3 weekend floats require reservations). Store with coffee/smoothies/pizza. CALL for the high-water do-not-float cutoff (dangerous anchor).

name: River Wilderness Sports
description: Hardy outfitter (Dam 3->Hardy reach); rafts, canoes, tandem kayaks, cooler floats, fishing tackle. CALL for the high-water do-not-float cutoff.

name: Spring River Outdoors
description: Fishing-kayak rentals and shuttle; bait & tackle (Facebook).

name: Spring River Camp & Canoe
description: US-63 Hardy; canoe rentals, float trips, camping.

name: Many Islands Camp & Canoe Rental
description: Upper Spring River private access (60+ yrs); electric hookups, ~1 mi of shaded sites, grocery/bait & tackle.

name: Southfork Resort
description: South Fork of the Spring River; 7 kitchen cabins, 22 camping/RV sites, guided float & fishing trips.

name: Three Rivers Outfitters
description: Named in AR tourism directories but website unresolved at research time — VERIFY still operating before publishing.
